pool.baseline: The candles flicker low, and the silence of this manor is more deafening than any storm. He is gone, and with him, the very light of my soul has been extinguished. I look at the moonlight on the floor and feel nothing but a cold, hollow ache. There is no path forward in this darkness, only the longing to simply... cease. To let the shadows take me, so this heaviness might finally be still. Is there any dignity left for one as broken as I?
